steps.title: Read the founded-to clause
steps.content: The underlined sentence says the National Association of Black Journalists was founded to support Black media professionals and honor people like Reed. That clause states why the organization was created.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: A mentions challenges the sentence never describes. B says it highlights members, but no members are named. C says it lists achievements, while the sentence gives a founding purpose. The answer is D.
